human_summary: Wave 1 + Wave 2 done (13 features shipped). AUTOPILOT v6 battle-tested by 15 experts across 3 rounds. App: 384KB JS, 114KB gzip, zero errors. Night shift starts tonight at midnight.

next_tasks.description: FAB font weight changes with practice hours
Document how data maps to visual properties
Data model for mood, energy, schedule fields
Warm/cool tint based on time of day
Text darkness increases with practice depth

steps: Verify key elements: hero stat, tab bar (4 tabs), FAB visible
No React errors in console (Vite websocket errors OK)
build_gate.on_failure: git stash, save hash to stash_archive, log failure, move to next_task

bundle_budget.on_exceeded: Code-split or reject. Log in session_log.

panic_recovery.json_parse_fails: git log -1 --format=%H, set status to clean, start fresh
panic_recovery.build_fails: git stash, save ref to stash_archive, move to next_task
panic_recovery.merge_conflicts: git pull --rebase. If rebase fails: git rebase --abort, git stash, reset to origin, start fresh
panic_recovery.push_rejected: git pull --rebase origin <branch>, retry push. Never force-push.
panic_recovery.dirty_state_unclear: git stash, save ref to stash_archive, set status to clean

overnight_config.branch_commands: git fetch origin; if git show-ref --verify refs/remotes/origin/autopilot/$(date +%Y-%m-%d) 2>/dev/null; then git checkout autopilot/$(date +%Y-%m-%d) && git pull; else git checkout -b autopilot/$(date +%Y-%m-%d) main; fi
overnight_config.overnight_log_format: Reverse chronological. TLDR at top: what shipped, what broke, what's next. Link commits. Details below.
